name: CTA right-side approved images
semantics: Three approved CTA right-side images, each locked to a specific background color: Email_Primary_2_column.png→Purple, Email_Primary_column_golf.png→Teal (LPGA-gated), Cake_lockup.png→Periwinkle. One image per background; not interchangeable.

name: IBS-C symptom icon trio
semantics: Fixed ordered trio Constipation → Belly Pain → Bloating, circular green-tinted icons with navy labels. All three must appear together in order; no substitution or reordering.
